## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build` locally and it succeeded (no TypeScript errors)
- [ ] If this changes study-mode content, I double-checked formulas/numbers against a source
- [ ] If this changes an animation, I tested light + dark theme
- [ ] I did **not** add new npm dependencies (or I have a good reason to, and I'll explain below)
